ground_truth.title: Online Courses with Certificates - Grow with Google
ground_truth.main_content:
Google Career Certificates

Job ready skills you can put to work

Level up your career with flexible online training. Get the hands-on experience and practical AI skills you need to help you stand out to employers in high-paying fields.

Get professional job training from Google

Learn at your own pace
Complete the online certificate program on your own terms.
3-6 mos
to complete with under 10 hours of flexible study per week

Stand out to employers
Make your resume competitive with a credential from Google.
75%
of certificate graduates report a positive career outcome (e.g., new job, promotion, or raise) within six months of completion.²

A path to high-paying fields
Connect with top employers who are currently hiring.
$96,000+
median salary across certificate fields¹

No experience necessary
Learn job-ready skills.
1.6M+
job postings across certificate fields¹

Foundational Certificates
Earn a credential that can help lead to jobs in high-paying fields

Data Analytics
4.8
(159,174 reviews)³
Data analysts collect, transform, and organize data in order to help make informed business decisions. Learn more
If you like: uncovering trends and patterns, visualizations

Project Management
4.9
(121,054 reviews)³
Project managers ensure projects within an organization are managed and completed with maximum value. Learn more
If you like: solving problems, organization, working with people

Cybersecurity
4.8
(46,535 reviews)³
Cybersecurity analysts are responsible for monitoring and protecting information and systems. Learn more
If you like: investigating, solving puzzles

Digital Marketing & E-commerce
4.8
(35,362 reviews)³
Digital marketers use online tools to reach customers. E-commerce specialists grow online sales. Learn more
If you like: uncovering trends and patterns, visualizations

IT Support
4.8
(187,814 reviews)³
IT Specialists troubleshoot problems so computers and networks run correctly. Learn more
If you like: solving problems, helping others

UX Design
4.8
(84,508 reviews)³
UX designers make digital and physical products easier and more enjoyable to use. Learn more
If you like: understanding people, drawing, thinking creatively

Gain skills fast or build on your existing certificate

Google Career Essentials
Quickly gain valuable competencies to add a skill to your resume, apply a new skill to uplevel your work, or simply learn something new.

Advanced Google Career Certificates
Go deeper in the field and gain more technical skills to take the next step in your career. Build on your Google Career Certificate and earn a credential in just a few months.

Made by partners
Add to your skills with training from expert partners and unlock industry-specific job opportunities. Build on your Google Career Certificate and earn a credential in just 1-2 months.

Get on the fast track to high-paying jobs with top employers

Flexible learning
Prepare for a new career in 3-6 months. No relevant experience or degrees required.

Free career support
Certificate graduates in the US will gain access to CareerCircle, which offers personalized coaching, mock interviews, and resume-building tools.

Connect with top employers
Use CareerCircle’s exclusive job board to connect directly with employers looking to hire Google Career Certificate graduates in the U.S.

CONNECT WITH +150 TOP EMPLOYERS, INCLUDING THESE:

certificate testimonial
“I appreciate the fact that these certificates were created. They provide opportunities for people who might not have any resources to get it the traditional way, but in my opinion, I didn’t want to do it traditionally. Now I've gotten a new job and can keep building on my experience!”
Trin completed the Google Digital Marketing and E-commerce Certificate and went from a barista to a media planner with full salary and benefits.
